description: Demo: verify repo context resolution works end-to-end
author: Ayush-Puri
goal: Verify that the context resolver correctly identifies repo paths, dependencies, and cross-repo impacts

tasks.title: Verify repo context was injected
tasks.prompt: You should see a 'Repository Context' section above this prompt. Confirm you can see: (1) backend repo details with path and dependencies, (2) product-api-common repo details, (3) a list of potentially affected repos. Write a confirmation to ~/claude-auto/logs/repo-context-test.md listing what repos you can see in your context.
tasks.verification: Check that ~/claude-auto/logs/repo-context-test.md exists and mentions 'backend' and 'product-api-common'
tasks.expectedResult: File exists confirming both repos were in the injected context
